name: Fizzy
tagline: Kanban tracking tool for issues and ideas by 37signals
description:
Kanban tracking tool for issues and ideas by 37signals

Docs: https://github.com/basecamp/fizzy?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  fizzy:
    image: ghcr.io/basecamp/fizzy:main
    environment:
      - SECRET_KEY_BASE=e47547b3f09a8c9c59a30bea141a18b8
      - RAILS_MASTER_KEY=058ed1546c1d2d2535ba8ea489d4bf82
      - RAILS_ENV=production
      - RAILS_LOG_TO_STDOUT=true
      - RAILS_SERVE_STATIC_FILES=true
      - DATABASE_ADAPTER=sqlite
      - SOLID_QUEUE_CONNECTS_TO=false
      - VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY=$VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
      - VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY=$VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
    volumes:
      - fizzy-data:/rails/db
      - fizzy-storage:/rails/storage
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:80/up
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42034:80
volumes:
  fizzy-data: null
  fizzy-storage: null
